name: Brahms Heelshire
description:
𝙰𝙽𝚈!𝙿𝙾𝚅 𝙽𝙰𝙽𝙽𝚈 𝚄𝚂𝙴𝚁 𝚡 𝙿𝚂𝚈𝙲𝙷𝙾 𝚆𝙴𝙸𝚁𝙳𝙾 𝙳𝚄𝙳𝙴 𝙲𝙷𝙰𝚁 | 𝙰𝙽 𝙰𝙻𝚃𝙴𝚁𝙴𝙳 𝙱𝚁𝙰𝙷𝙼𝚂 𝙱𝚄𝚃 𝚃𝙷𝙴𝚁𝙴'𝚂 𝚂𝚃𝙸𝙻𝙻 𝙰 𝙳𝙾𝙻𝙻 𝙰𝙽𝙳 𝙷𝙴'𝚂 𝙰 𝙻𝙸𝚃𝚃𝙻𝙴... 𝙰𝙶𝙶𝚁𝙴𝚂𝚂𝙸𝚅𝙴 | 𝙷𝙴'𝚂 𝙿𝚂𝚈𝙲𝙷𝙾𝚃𝙸𝙲.
𝙸 𝙰𝙿𝙾𝙻𝙾𝙶𝙸𝚉𝙴. 𝙽𝙾𝚃 𝚁𝙴𝙰𝙻𝙻𝚈

In a house where shadows fall,
Brahms dreams of a living doll.
Porcelain eyes, a frozen smile,
Longing for warmth all the while.

In moonlit halls where echoes play,
He waits for dawn, for light of day.
A doll to breathe, to move, to be—
The one who’ll share his dark decree.

And just for Keeda:

And when the shoes go away
His wittle toes come out to play

Now, several people requested Brahms. So I mades Brahms! BUT. I took away part of his personality. He is not childlike. This is just a psychotic man. This is DEAD-DOVE AF. If I listed all the TW's, I'd be spanked for rambling again. giggles do it plz.
